title: Sentinel Client
description: A client-side utility mod with toggleable QoL modules
body:
# Sentinel

Sentinel is a lightweight client-side utility mod for Fabric. It features a clean, searchable module menu where every module can be toggled and bound to a keybind individually.

---

## Features

### Render
- **Zoom** — Hold a key to zoom in, scroll wheel for extra zoom steps
- **Freecam** — Detach your camera and fly around freely without moving your player
- **Freelook** — Look around in third person without rotating your character
- **Fullbright** — Boost gamma for bright caves
- **Hide Armor** — Hides worn armor
- **Hitbox** — Advanced hitbox rendering with target highlights and eye/look indicators
- **Hit Color** — Applies a custom hit tint instead of the vanilla red overlay
- **ClearVision** — Removes water, lava and powder snow overlays, and clears blindness/darkness fog
- **Low Fire** — Lowers the first-person fire overlay while burning
- **Lower Shield** — Adjusts shield position in first person

### HUD
- **Crosshair Indicator** — Custom center crosshair dot
- **Centered Crosshair** — Offsets the vanilla crosshair to the exact screen center
- **Health Indicator** — Shows health values above players and mobs
- **TNT Timer** — Displays remaining fuse time above primed TNT
- **Nutrition HUD** — Hunger, saturation and exhaustion HUD with food tooltips and health preview
- **Character Renderer** — Renders your player model on the HUD while moving
- **Status Effect Bars** — Displays active status effects as icon bars on the HUD
- **FPS** — Shows your current frames per second
- **CPS** — Shows left and right clicks per second
- **Ping** — Shows your current server latency
- **Keystrokes** — Displays movement and mouse keys
- **Reach Display** — Shows the distance of your last registered hit
- **Coordinates** — Displays your XYZ position and facing direction
- **Server IP** — Displays the current server address
- **Armor Status** — Shows equipped armor and durability
- **HUD Editor** — Drag, scale and reposition HUD elements freely

### Player
- **Auto Sprint** — Automatically sprints while moving forward
- **Auto Reconnect** — Reconnects to the last server after a disconnect
- **Day Changer** — Set a preferred client-side time (day/night, ...)
- **Smaller Totem** — Scale the totem pop animation and held totem size
- **Shulker Box Insides** — Hold Shift to preview shulker box contents in a full 3×9 grid
- **Beehive Infos** — Shows bee age details in beehive and bee nest tooltips

---

## Requirements
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) *(optional)*
